title: Bluey Bubble Machine for Kids - Character Shaped Bubble Blower - Great for Outdoors - Ages 3+
features: 🎉 Adorable design of Bluey Bubble Machine shaped like Bluey, the beloved character from the children's series. Colorful, fun and perfect for entertaining little ones.
Endless Fun Automatic bubble generator produces a steady stream for hours of play in the garden, yard or inside the house.
✅ EASY TO USE Includes 4oz of bubble solution. Just pour into Bluey's belly, press his nose and the magic begins!
💪️ ECO-FRIENDLY PACKAGING Presented in FSC certified packaging, ideal for families looking for sustainable and planet-responsible toys.
PORTABLE & BATTERY POWERED Powered by 3 AA batteries (not included). Wear it to parties, gatherings or sunny days at the park.
description: Product description Bluey Bubble Machine for Kids - Character Bubble Blower and 4oz Solution Battery powered, ideal for outdoor use. Fun for toddlers and preschoolers. Suitable for ages 3 and up. Directions Pour 4oz of bubble solution into Bluey's belly, press his nose to start generating bubbles.
